entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `lastVisited` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_visited_items_title_url
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_visited_items_title_url` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`title`, `url`)
